top_thesis.statement: Crypto protocol exploit and security-incident velocity keeps accelerating through H2 2026, as cross-chain bridges, oracle-dependent perp DEXs, and autonomous AI agents outpace security investment and broaden the attack surface beyond classic DeFi hacks into AI-agent-executed breaches and insider-hiring failures

Daily news snapshot: Altcoins watchlist
1. EGL1 (EGL1): +112.19%
• Market cap: $12.7 million
• EGL1, a BSC-based meme coin, surged 112% in 24 hours on Bitget. The catalyst is unclear, and the token trades on multiple exchanges including Gate, KuCoin, and Bitget.
• Extreme volatility and the low market cap point to speculative positioning rather than fundamentals.
Matters because: the move looks driven by speculation, not a clear catalyst, so the token may remain highly volatile.
2. ZAMA (ZAMA): +26.22%
• Market cap: $106.9 million
• Zama, a privacy-focused FHE infrastructure protocol, gained 26.22% on OKX.
• The token is listed on 23 CEX platforms including Binance, OKX, and Coinbase.
Matters because: renewed interest in privacy infrastructure may be supporting the move, even without a specific catalyst.
3. Uniswap (UNI): +3.02%
• Market cap: $2.36 billion
• Uniswap gained 3.02% on OKX, outperforming broader market weakness.
• The move aligns with improving sentiment around DeFi infrastructure and tokenized assets, which saw record activity this week.
Matters because: UNI is benefiting from stronger DeFi and tokenization sentiment while the broader market remains weak.

recent_posts.text:
BLOCKAID DETECTS EXPLOIT TARGETING AFX XYZ BRIDGE ON ARBITRUM, APPROXIMATELY 24.15M USDC DRAINED
SOURCE

tweet.text:
Blockaid detected an exploit at 2026-07-22 21:30 UTC targeting @AFX_XYZ, a protocol on @arbitrum. The exploit was specific to a bridge that AFX operates. Approximately 24.15M USDC has been drained thus far from the protocol.

Our team has been working with the incredible folks on the Arbitrum team to respond to the incident, to engage with the affected protocol, and to help them contain the stolen funds.

Exploit tx: https://arbiscan.io/tx/0x50d0b3ec6c3f5fce0f10abf81540bbb508f421494aa2b3480c4a264b0436547b

Bitcoin ETF inflows extend to fifth consecutive day, totaling $727M –
Link
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs logged $227M in net inflows on July 20, bringing the streak to five straight positive days, the longest since May. The flows came alongside cooling inflation at 3.5% YoY and GDP growth of 2.1% annualized.
Matters because:
sustained ETF demand can support BTC price stability and suggests renewed institutional confidence in risk assets.

tweet.text:
Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $227M in Net Inflows on July 20

On July 20 (ET), U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of $227 million, marking the fifth consecutive day of net inflows. U.S. spot Ethereum ETFs saw total net inflows of $38.09 million.

Backpack CEO: “It's Going to Be Really Hard to Convince Startups to Build Stock Products on Robinhood Chain”
> “Solana's moat is and always will be it's vibrant startup ecosystem.”
> “The only choice serious founders have is a credibly neutral platform where your business isn't going to be directly killed by the house.”
Source:
https://x.com/armaniferrante/status/2079921704504021149

tweet.text:
It's going to be really hard to convince startups to build stock products on Robinhood chain. 

Why would you? 

You're competing with Robinhood. 

Robinhood chain will do great. Robinhood is awesome, but it's a different category of thing. @solana's moat is and always will be it's vibrant startup ecosystem.

The only choice serious founders have is a credibly neutral platform where your business isn't going to be directly killed by the house.

recent_posts.text:
White House Accuses China’s Moonshot AI of Distilling Anthropic’s Fable to Develop Kimi K3
> The White House Office of Science and Technology Policy accused China's Moonshot AI of covertly distilling Anthropic's Fable model at scale using a sophisticated platform designed to evade detection, while also acquiring restricted Nvidia GB300 servers to train its K3 model.
Source:
https://x.com/mkratsios47/status/2079933645888880708

tweet.text:
We have information that Moonshot AI distilled Anthropic’s Fable for the development of its K3 model. 

To do this they developed a sophisticated internal platform to conduct large scale distillation against U.S. models, allowing them to quickly switch between multiple methods of access to avoid detection. Moonshot AI has also acquired GB300-equipped servers and has accessed GB300s in Thailand, likely to train its AI models.
 
The United States strongly supports the free and fair development of AI, including a thriving competitive ecosystem that spans frontier models, specialized systems, open-source frameworks, and open-weight models. Legitimate AI distillation used to create smaller, more efficient models plays a vital role in this open innovation ecosystem. However, large-scale, covert industrial distillation aimed at stealing proprietary U.S. technology and undermining American research is unacceptable.

Clarity Act ethics provision agreement reached with White House –
Link
President Trump agreed to include an ethics provision in the crypto market structure bill, easing Democratic concerns and clearing a major hurdle. The bill would define SEC vs. CFTC jurisdiction for digital assets, and Congress has about until August 7 before recess.
Matters because:
clearer market structure would be key infrastructure for RWA tokenization and broader crypto regulation.

tweet.text:
NEW: President Donald Trump is said to have made historic concessions in the deal to allow an ethics provision in the crypto Clarity Act that curtails the president’s own activities, and the White House is pushing Democrats to accept it.

@jesseahamilton reports.
